name: Golf USA
about: GolfUSA of Limerick is an indoor golf simulator facility and retail store offering precise club fitting services using advanced technology like the Flightscope® Launch Monitor and Mizuno Shaft Optimizer. The venue features a variety of services including indoor simulator play with access to 46 virtual golf courses from North America, Europe, and Asia, professional lessons with a Director of Instruction, and a full-service pro shop. Pricing includes per-bay hourly rates with weekday specials and a yearly membership option that provides unlimited simulator rentals during off-peak hours.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium club fitting technology with Flightscope Launch Monitor and Mizuno Shaft Optimizer
Access to 46 virtual golf courses including famous courses like Pebble Beach and St. Andrews
Yearly membership offers significant discounts on simulator time, leagues, and pro shop items

food_and_drink.notes: Food delivery options available from local eateries

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for club fitting and ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue also offers club rentals and a pro shop for purchasing equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility has a BYOB policy and offers food delivery options from local eateries.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A nine-hole round typically takes about 45 minutes to complete.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue accommodates junior golfers and offers leagues for all skill levels.
